text:
Order of the Supreme Court
Judgment
R. Mahadevan, J.
1. 
This writ petition has been filed as a Public Interest Litigation invoking 
jurisdiction under Article 32 of the Constitution of India, seeking a 
writ of mandamus directing the Respondent Nos.1 to 4 to provide the 
petitioner with the facility of a scribe, compensatory time and all other 
facilities, to which he may be entitled, under the law, considering his 
disability status for the upcoming examinations, the details of which 
are tabulated below:
[2025] 2 S.C.R.  
317
Gulshan Kumar v. Institute of Banking Personnel Selection & Ors.
Examinations
Conducting Bodies
Date(s)
Common Recruitment

of Probationary officers/ 
Management trainees

26/11/2022 or 
any other date

(Junior Associate &
